name: Internal CAPL Coding Standards
title: Internal CAPL Coding Standards (EQ07 Project)
intro: Team-internal coding conventions for CAPL on EQ07 (BMS) project. Supplements Vector official CAPL documentation with project-specific patterns.
These rules are enforced via PR review. They reflect 2+ years of EQ07 development lessons.

paragraphs: Functions: PascalCase for project-specific, camelCase for wrappers of Vector APIs.
Constants: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE, group by subsystem prefix.
Every timer MUST be cancelled in on stop handler to prevent leakage.
Use named constants for timer periods.
